name: Classic Thai Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute.
3. Add the red curry paste and stir-fry until it releases its aroma.
4. Add the tofu and cook another 3 minutes.
5. Add the cooked rice, mix and fry for 2 minutes.
6. Add the soy sauce, green onion, and cilantro; transfer to a serving dish.
7. Garnish with chopped green onions and thin cucumber slices.
Serve with clear soup and salad. This makes a complete meal on its own. For chilies in vinegar: Chop half a cup of fresh green and red chilies into small pieces. Mix with 1½ cups rice vinegar and 3 tbsp soy sauce; serve immediately. Refrigerated, it will keep for several weeks.
